title: The Leaders and Chief Whips of Recognised Parties and Groups in Parliament (Facilities) Act, 1998
full_text: The Leaders and Chief Whips of Recognised Parties and Groups in Parliament (Facilities) Act, 1998 संसद् में मान्यताप्राप्‍त दलों तथा समूहों के नेता औरमुख्य सचेतक (प्रसुविधाएं) अधिनियम, 1998 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 199905 Act Number: 05 Enactment Date: 1999-01-07 Act Year: 1999 Short Title: The Leaders and Chief Whips of Recognised Parties and Groups in Parliament (Facilities) Act, 1998 Hindi Title: संसद् में मान्यताप्राप्‍त दलों तथा समूहों के नेता औरमुख्य सचेतक (प्रसुविधाएं) अधिनियम, 1998 Long Title: An Act to provide for facilities to Leaders and Chief Whips of recognised parties and groups in Parliament. Ministry: Ministry of Parliamentary Affairs Enforcement Date: 05-02-1999 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Leaders and Chief Whips of Recognised Parties and Groups in Parliament (Facilities) Act, 1998 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Facilities to the Leaders and Chief Whips of recognised groups and parties. Section 4. Power to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 5. Amendment of section 3 of Act 10 of 1959.
